docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STARK, L. SUSAN AS TO DEFENDANT SCHMITT, JOHN H. PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STARK, L. SUSAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCHMITT, JOHN H. $3,361.15 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,361.15, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR: STATUTORY COSTS TO PLAINTIFF[S] L SUSAN STARK
